hero.tagline: I build scalable web applications with clean code & great user experiences

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Who I Am
about.p1: I'm a passionate full-stack developer with expertise in building modern, scalable web applications. I specialize in JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems, crafting seamless experiences from database to UI.
about.p2: With a strong foundation in both frontend and backend technologies, I bring ideas to life through clean architecture, performant code, and thoughtful design. I'm constantly exploring new tools and patterns to deliver the best solutions.
about.p3: When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring open-source projects, contributing to developer communities, or experimenting with emerging technologies.

items.title: Project One
items.description: A full-stack web application built with Next.js and Node.js featuring real-time updates and a modern UI.

items.title: Project Two
items.description: An e-commerce platform with payment integration, inventory management, and responsive design.

items.title: Project Three
items.description: A real-time collaboration tool with WebSocket support, authentication, and cloud storage.
Building and maintaining scalable web applications, leading technical decisions, and mentoring junior developers.
Developed RESTful APIs and microservices, optimized database queries, and implemented CI/CD pipelines.
Built responsive UIs, wrote unit tests, and contributed to the development of internal tools.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's Work Together
contact.description: Have a project in mind or just want to say hello? I'd love to hear from you.
